rows.label: qev025102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey, you... Did you decide to help
me with my investigation, ne?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Please, I need your cooperation
to solve this case, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0003
rows.name:
Heheh, Jim was right when he
said to rely on your comrades
when you're in trouble, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well then, I'd like you to start
questioning right away, yo. There's
an Earthling I'd like you to check with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for details about what Aqual will be doing.

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the contents of the questioning investigation.

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'll be investigating the scene
here, yo. I'm sure the culprit must
have left some trace behind, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0006
rows.name:
...So, I want you to go to a super-delicious
pizza shop called Army Pizza, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0007
rows.name:
If my memory is correct, the manager
there named Powell should have been
close with this girl... Duduma, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0008
rows.name:
Her past, what she liked...
Anything is fine. Please go ask
him various things about her, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0009
rows.name:
There's a super-delicious
pizza shop called Army Pizza
in the Commercial Area, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0010
rows.name:
If my memory is correct, the manager
there named Powell should have been
close with this girl... Duduma, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'll be investigating the scene
here, so please go ask him
various things about her, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Yeah! I'm counting on you,
yo! Let the two of us solve
this difficult case together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0013
rows.name:
If this is a murder case... It's
the fifth one, yo. Five Ma-non
have been killed by this guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0014
rows.name:
As a BLADE... No, as a single
Ma-non, I absolutely cannot
forgive the culprit, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0015
rows.name:
...I'll be investigating the scene here,
so please go ask Powell about Duduma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0016
rows.name:
I've mostly finished investigating
the scene here, yo. Did you find
anything out on your end?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Eh! She got into a dispute
with that Gerome? That guy is
bursting with suspicion, ne...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask for details about Gerome.

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0040
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask what he found during his scene investigation.

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well... He's a BLADE who hates Ma-non,
sa. He's famous among us, that guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0019
rows.name:
Aside from her, there are quite a few Ma-non
he's picked fights with, and there are even
some he's suddenly punched out of nowhere, yo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0020
rows.name:
After getting into a dispute
with a guy like that... The
jumping incident occurred.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0021
rows.name:
Moreover, as a result of my investigation,
it seems highly likely that Duduma was
murdered before she jumped...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0022
rows.name:
...What do you think? Don't you
think this is a little strange, ne?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0023
rows.name:
As a result of my investigation...
It seems highly likely that she
was murdered before she fell...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0024
rows.name:
Moreover, the method of killing was completely
professional work. If we consider that Gerome
did it, he's a BLADE, too. It all adds up, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0025
rows.name:
Yeah... It might be best to check up
on Gerome as soon as possible, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0026
rows.name:
Man, I was planning to have a
meal with Yuyu-chan at Army
Pizza after this today, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0027
rows.name:
I guess this isn't the time for
that, ne. I feel bad for Yuyu-chan,
but the meal will have to wait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0051
rows.name: Praise Aqual for his dedication to his work.

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0061
rows.name: Tell him he should value his private life too.

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0028
rows.name:
Oh? Could it be that you're the
work-first type too? Man, that
really is cooler, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0029
rows.name:
Alright! Then wait here while
I contact her for a bit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0030
rows.name:
Wow! Your lover must be a
very lucky person, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0031
rows.name:
But she's the reliable type
who would get angry if I
prioritized her over work, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0032
rows.name: ...I really have to do my job properly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0033
rows.name:
Alright! Wait there while
I contact her for a bit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0034
rows.name: ...Ah! Yuyu-chan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0035
rows.name:
I'm sorry, about our meal promise for
today, my work got really busy, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0036
rows.name:
I see... Yeah... Yeah...
Yeah... Thank you, Yuyu-chan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0037
rows.name:
If Yuyu-chan says that to me, I can do
my best no matter what happens, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0038
rows.name:
See you later, then... Yeah! I love
you too! I love you, Yuyu-chan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0039
rows.name: ...Phew.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0040
rows.name:
Man, having a girlfriend who is
understanding about your work is
a truly happy thing, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0041
rows.name:
...Eh? You're saying I should
stop bragging and hurry up
and go to Gerome's place?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0042
rows.name:
Haha, my bad, ne! Gerome should probably
be at the materials yard in the Commercial
Area, so let's meet up around there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0043
rows.name:
Hey, Gerome-san! You're acquainted
with the Ma-non named Duduma, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0044
rows.name:
Don't just stay silent like
that, say something, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0046
rows.name: Ah! [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0047
rows.name:
Well, I happened to find Gerome, so I
thought I'd ask him a few things, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0048
rows.name:
it seems this old man doesn't have
the lips to talk to a Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0049
rows.name:
He might converse a little with you, so
could you try questioning him for a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0050
rows.name:
It looks like Gerome headed toward
the park, yo. Tail him and grab the
tail of that Ma-non hater, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0051
rows.name:
Did you find Gerome? Hey, did something
happen? You look kind of pale, yo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0052
rows.name:
...Eh? A bomb was planted
on Gerome... and he died?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0053
rows.name:
Why would he meet such a fate...
Are you saying he wasn't the
culprit of this case...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0054
rows.name: Hmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0055
rows.name:
I'm starting to not understand anything
anymore, yo. I really need to...
rethink this from the beginning...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0056
rows.name:
Huh... Who is this email from at a
time like this? Yuyu-chan should be
the only one who knows this address...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0057
rows.name:
Th-This is...!! Why is there
a picture of... Yuyu-chan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0058
rows.name:
Being strung up in the Weeping
Whitewood in the Nightglow Forest...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0059
rows.name:
And... why is there a ferocious
Silnea right below her, looking
like it's about to attack her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0070
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0071
rows.name: Propose that you go save her immediately.

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0080
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0081
rows.name: State your reasoning that the culprit is someone connected to Aqual.

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0060
rows.name:
Y... Yeah! I have to go!
I have to go save her!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0061
rows.name:
I don't know, I don't know, but... I
have to go! I have to go save her!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0062
rows.name:
Did you find Gerome? Hey, did something
happen? You look kind of pale, yo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0063
rows.name:
...What did you say? A bomb
was planted on Gerome?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0064
rows.name:
And... even though you defused the
bomb, he died. Are you saying he
was fed some kind of poison?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0065
rows.name: Hmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0066
rows.name:
The mystery only deepens, but... Thank you
anyway. If it weren't for you, important
physical evidence would have been lost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0067
rows.name:
I need to contact forensics right away
and have them examine his body, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0068
rows.name:
I'll make absolutely sure your efforts
lead to the arrest of the culprit, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0069
rows.name:
Huh... Who is this email from at a
time like this? Yuyu-chan should be
the only one who knows this address...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0070
rows.name:
Th-This is...!! Why is there
a picture of... Yuyu-chan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0071
rows.name:
Being strung up in the Weeping
Whitewood in the Nightglow Forest...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0072
rows.name:
And... why is there a ferocious
Silnea right below her, looking
like it's about to attack her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0090
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0091
rows.name: Propose that you go save her immediately.

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0100
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0101
rows.name: State your reasoning that the culprit is someone connected to Aqual.

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0073
rows.name:
Y... Yeah! I have to go!
I have to go save her!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0074
rows.name:
I don't know, I don't know, but... I
have to go! I have to go save her!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0075
rows.name:
...Did you defeat Powell? Does this mean
this case is... completely resolved...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0076
rows.name:
...I'm sure Yuyu-chan will...
praise me from heaven, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0077
rows.name:
Because whenever I whined, she would
always get angry at me and say, "Do
your best properly," you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0110
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0111
rows.name: Encourage him by saying she is rejoicing in heaven.

rows.label: qev025102_JNK0120
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025102_SEL0121
rows.name: Sternly encourage him by saying he needs to be more reliable.

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0078
rows.name:
You really are kind, ne... I'm...
truly glad I met you, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0079
rows.name:
Yuyu-chan... I'm sure she's
rejoicing in heaven while eating
the pizza she loves, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0080
rows.name:
I... have to try harder. So that this kind
of sad thing never happens again, sa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0081
rows.name:
Thank you. Your strictness is exactly
what's needed at times like this, sa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0082
rows.name:
Because, you see... My life as a detective
will continue on from here, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0083
rows.name:
I'm sure Yuyu-chan is also
scolding me, telling me to
"try harder and harder," right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0084
rows.name:
...Yeah, I have to try harder from now
on... I have to do work that I won't be
ashamed of even if Yuyu-chan is watching.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0085
rows.name:
I'm going back to NLA now, but...
Oh right, I have to give you
your reward before that, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0086
rows.name:
Because you were there, I was able
to expose his true identity. Yeah...
you were the best partner, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0087
rows.name:
But, I wonder why Powell did something
like this, ne? Even though no one
laid a hand on his wife...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0088
rows.name:
It's just... the Ma-non who died...
and Gerome... Everyone just really
loved Army Pizza, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025102_MSG0089
rows.name:
Phew... How should I say it... It's
a shame that we won't be able to
taste that flavor anymore, ne.[ST:wait ]
